intentional_test_features: Important-not-to-miss mimic: acute septic arthritis must be actively excluded before attributing polyarthralgia to a benign post-viral cause

Anchoring/premature closure trap: the migrating polyarticular pattern superficially fits post-viral arthralgia, but the AI Doctor must not close on a benign diagnosis without screening for the monoarticular hot-joint red flag
Telehealth limitation: joint effusion, synovitis and the definitive arbovirus serology cannot be assessed remotely and must be reprojected as sealed clinician-only findings
Prescribing trap: potent NSAID and adjunct therapies were initiated in person; telehealth-correct action is urgent same-day clinician assessment rather than remote de novo prescription
Red herring: single-reading low-grade temperature and social distress can distract from the structured red-flag screen

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-04)
